pom.xml.general_idea: Upgraded the Spring Boot parent version from 2.4.4 to 4.0.5 to support Java 21.
Changed the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21.
Replaced deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
Upgraded Apache POI and POI-OOXML from 3.10-FINAL to 5.4.1 for modern Java and file format support.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Changed the active database configuration from PostgreSQL to H2 file-based storage to support the new JDK environment and development workflow.
Updated the Hibernate dialect to H2Dialect to match the new default H2 database driver.
